understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid and activate goal cells by having your carried piece match the goal's required shape, color, and rotation, then stepping onto the goal cell. Complete all goals in a level to advance; complete all levels to win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves using directional actions (MOVE_NORTH, etc.) which consume stamina. Stamina depletion without completing a goal costs a life; losing all lives ends the game. Modifier tiles on the grid (shape, color, rotation) change the piece's attributes when stepped on. The piece's shape, color, and rotation must all match the goal's requirements simultaneously to be able to complete it by stepping there. The grid contains walls that block movement.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid and activate goal cells by having your carried piece match the goal's required shape, color, and rotation, then stepping onto the goal cell. Complete all goals in a level to advance; complete all levels to win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves using directional actions (MOVE_NORTH, etc.) which consume stamina. Stamina depletion without completing a goal costs a life; losing all lives ends the game. Modifier tiles on the grid (shape, color, rotation) change the piece's attributes when stepped on. The piece's shape, color, and rotation must all match the goal's requirements simultaneously to be able to complete it by stepping there. The grid contains walls that block movement.
